title: ivodea antilahimenae
intro: Ivodea antilahimenae is a plant species that belongs to the family Rubiaceae. It has been traditionally used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Ivodea antilahimenae include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various infections. Herbal preparations of Ivodea antilahimenae can be made into teas, infusions, or extracts, and it is often used in combination with other plants in traditional medicine.
